sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n112566" key="fu/lios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φύλιος</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ῡ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">α</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n112566.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of a tribe,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">θεοί</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:8:110" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8.110</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
